summary: Comprehensive testing completed for 3 new Calendar features: date clicking, edit event, and class name prefill. All 6 features verified working correctly via pytest (backend) and Playwright (frontend).

calendar_date_clicking.description: Clicking on calendar date opens Add Event dialog with the clicked date pre-filled in start_date field. Uses handleSlotSelect callback with onSelectSlot prop on BigCalendar.

edit_event_button.description: Edit button present in event view dialog. Clicking it opens edit form with all event data pre-filled (title, description, dates, event type, class_id, participants).

class_selection_prefill.description: Selecting a class from dropdown pre-fills the event title with 'ClassName - Subject' format. Title remains editable after prefill.

add_event_button.description: Add Event button opens Create New Event dialog. Form includes all fields: title, description, event type, class, dates, participants.

delete_event_button.description: Delete button present in event view dialog footer. Triggers confirmation and deletes event from database.

mark_attendance_navigation.description: Mark Attendance for this Event button present in event view dialog. Navigates to /attendance with event_id and date query params.

critical_code_review_comments: CalendarPage.js: Well-implemented with memoized callbacks (handleSlotSelect, handleClassChange) for performance
handleEditEvent properly parses dates and sets isEditing state for form reuse
handleClassChange checks if title is empty or auto-generated before prefilling - good UX
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Event view dialog has Clear layout with Edit, Delete, Close buttons in DialogFooter
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Playwright_Event for testing, cleaned up TEST_ prefixed events in pytest
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new calendar features fully tested and working. Key data-testid attributes: calendar-page, add-event-button, event-title-input, event-description-input, event-type-select, event-class-select, event-start-date-input, event-end-date-input, event-submit-button, edit-event-button. Calendar uses react-big-calendar with selectable={true} and onSelectSlot for date clicking. Edit flow uses isEditing state to switch between create/update modes.

backend_tests_summary.test_create_event_with_class_id: PASS - Event created with class reference
backend_tests_summary.test_get_classes_for_prefill: PASS - Classes available for title prefill
